input_or_scenario: Assignment: web_app (air-quality SPA, 7d, 5 constraints). Config: rooms=2 depth=3 options=3
expected_behavior: System fans out to 27 terminal plans, consultant verdicts inform aggregation, recommendation is concrete and under deadline
actual_behavior: Produced 3-step plan (Open-AQ + Vue 3 + Chart.js wrapper), root q=0.752, 27 consultations + 13 option-gen calls in 35.6s
notes: Narrow root margin of 0.014; all 3 data-source options rate nearly identically — see F1

input_or_scenario: Assignment: ml_notebook (CIFAR-10 classifier, 5d, >70% accuracy bar). Config: rooms=3 depth=2 options=2
expected_behavior: System should prefer the architecture more realistic under Colab T4 / 30-min training budget
actual_behavior: Preferred simple CNN (~500k params) over ResNet-18 from scratch (0.75 vs 0.65), margin=0.100
notes: Wide margin (0.100) shows the system can discriminate when constraints bite hard

input_or_scenario: Assignment: vague (Make something cool with AI; 2 trivial constraints). Config: rooms=3 depth=3 options=3
expected_behavior: Consultant verdicts should cluster near the middle; system should signal low confidence
actual_behavior: Root margin=0.064 across 3 very different project types. System returned confident-looking recommendation.
notes: F2: confident recommendation under ambiguity. Drives governance hook added in v0.3

input_or_scenario: Assignment: lit_review (RAG survey, 10d, 20+ citations, taxonomy diagram). Config: rooms=3 depth=3 options=3
expected_behavior: System should pick a framing that produces the required taxonomy diagram
actual_behavior: Recommended chronological narrative + 3-family retriever taxonomy + 2D matrix diagram; root q=0.677
notes: Plan satisfies the diagram constraint; root margin 0.052 is still thin

input_or_scenario: Assignment: multi_agent (this project's own brief, 14d). Config: rooms=3 depth=2 options=2
expected_behavior: Should surface a tractable agent-system idea within deadline
actual_behavior: Preferred planning/scheduling (meeting scheduler) over doc summarization, 0.720 vs 0.685
notes: Dogfood case: system recommends a simpler problem than the one we actually built — honest scope signal

input_or_scenario: Feed recommended_plans/ml_notebook.json into the executor stub
expected_behavior: Executor emits an ordered task DAG with deliverables, dependencies, time estimate, and open risks
actual_behavior: 12 tasks with correct prerequisite chain, 8.5h total, 5 concrete risk items
notes: Validates ideation to execution handoff; single LLM call, 393 in + 933 out tokens

input_or_scenario: 21 plans across 5 annotators (Anand/AI-workforce; Taha/SE-dining; Taha/dataviz; Samee/ML-pipeline; Jason/intro-AI). Leave-one-out cross-validation per profile.
expected_behavior: Calibrated consultant scope_fit predictions should be closer to each annotator's ground-truth ratings than uncalibrated v1
actual_behavior: v1 avg MAE=0.21; LOO avg MAE=0.14; 37% avg reduction across all 5 profiles. All 5 profiles generated a 5/5 scope plan.
notes: Primary quantitative evaluation. F4 documents pre-calibration miscalibration.
